issuesFound.title: mobileNav – toggle functions do not set aria‑expanded on the trigger button when opening or closing the mobile navigation drawer.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, true) when opening and setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, false) when closing.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav – toggle button does not update aria‑pressed to reflect its open/closed state.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-pressed', 'true') on open and setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-pressed', 'false') on close.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav – trigger button lacks aria‑controls that points to the drawer element.
issuesFound.fix: After locating _drawer, add setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.CONTROLS, _drawer.id) or generate an id for the drawer and reference it.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav – drawer element is hidden/shown via CSS classes but never receives aria‑hidden when hidden.
issuesFound.fix: In close(), add setAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true'); and in open() remove that attribute.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu – open/close functions do not set aria‑expanded on the dropdown trigger button.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true') when opening and setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false') when closing.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu – dropdown panels are hidden/shown via hidden attribute but never receive aria‑hidden when hidden.
issuesFound.fix: In _closeInstance(), add setAttr(inst.panel, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true') and remove it in _openInstance().

issuesFound.title: siteSearch – the combobox input does not set aria‑expanded to indicate when the suggestion listbox is visible.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true') when opening and setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false') when closing.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch – the suggestion listbox is shown/hidden by adding/removing the hidden attribute but never updates aria‑hidden.
issuesFound.fix: In show(), add removeAttr(_listEl, ARIA.HIDDEN); and in hide(), add setAttr(_listEl, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true').

issuesFound.title: siteSearch – dynamic suggestion updates (result count, “no results”, error messages) are not announced via a live region.
issuesFound.fix: After updating the status text (e.g., in _updateStatus()), also call liveRegion.announce(message) so screen readers are informed.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion – open/close functions do not set aria‑expanded on the FAQ trigger button.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true') when opening and setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false') when closing.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion – FAQ answer panels are hidden/shown via hidden attribute but never receive aria‑hidden when hidden.
issuesFound.fix: In close(), add setAttr(item.panel, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true') and remove it in open().

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion – opening or closing a FAQ item is not announced via a live region.
issuesFound.fix: After changing the state, call liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} – ${STRINGS.faqOpened}`) or similar; likewise announce when closed.

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator – validation failures do not set aria‑invalid on the associated form field.
issuesFound.fix: In _renderResult(), when result.valid is false, add setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'true'); and when true, remove the attribute.

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator – validation successes do not clear aria‑invalid on the field.
issuesFound.fix: When result.valid is true, call removeAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID) or setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'false').

issuesFound.title: pricing – the billing‑period toggle switch (data‑billing‑toggle) does not update aria‑pressed when toggling between monthly and annual plans.
issuesFound.fix: After toggling, add setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-pressed', String(_pricingState.period === 'year')).

issuesFound.title: pricing – the billing‑period toggle does not set aria‑controls to reference the pricing table it controls.
issuesFound.fix: Ensure the toggle element has setAttr(_toggleEl, ARIA.CONTROLS, pricingTable.id) where pricingTable is the element showing the plan cards.

issuesFound.title: pricing – when a plan’s price changes (e.g., after switching billing period), the change is not announced via a live region.
issuesFound.fix: After updating the price display, call liveRegion.announce(`${plan.id} price updated to ${formattedPrice}`).

issuesFound.title: mediaPlayerController – play/pause button (space or “k”) does not set aria‑pressed to reflect playing state.
issuesFound.fix: After changing playback state, add setAttr(media, 'aria-pressed', String(!media.paused)).

issuesFound.title: mediaPlayerController – mute button (“m”) does not set aria‑pressed to reflect mute state.
issuesFound.fix: After muting/unmuting, add setAttr(media, 'aria-pressed', String(media.muted)).

issuesFound.title: mediaPlayerController – the media element does not have aria‑label or role to identify it as a media widget for assistive tech.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(media, 'role', 'region') and setAttr(media, 'aria-label', 'Media player') or a more specific label.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open/close functions do not update aria‑expanded (HIGH)
issuesFound.explanation: The functions _openInstance and _closeInstance in the dropdownMenu module toggle visibility of the panel but never set aria‑expanded on the trigger button, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the menu state.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, String(open)); in _openInstance and setAttr(trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false'); in _closeInstance.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu triggers missing initial aria‑expanded attribute (MEDIUM)
issuesFound.explanation: When a dropdown is registered, the trigger button receives aria‑haspopup and aria‑controls but never receives an initial aria‑expanded="false", so its collapsed state is not conveyed to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: In register add setAttr(trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false'); after setting aria‑controls.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle button missing aria‑pressed (HIGH)
issuesFound.explanation: The hamburger button _navToggle acts as a two‑state toggle (open/closed) but never updates aria‑pressed, violating the ARIA toggle pattern.
issuesFound.fix: In mobileNav.toggle or open/close functions, call setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.PRESSED, String(_open)); or setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.PRESSED, 'true'/'false').

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing initial aria‑expanded (MEDIUM)
issuesFound.explanation: On page load the mobile nav trigger does not have aria‑expanded set, so its default collapsed state is not announced.
issuesFound.fix: In mobileNav.init after locating _trigger, add setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation drawer hidden without aria‑hidden (MEDIUM)
issuesFound.explanation: mobileNav.close removes the “is‑open” class but never sets aria‑hidden="true" on the drawer element, leaving hidden content in the accessibility tree.
issuesFound.fix: In close add setAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true'); and in open remove that attribute.

issuesFound.title: Sticky header hide/show does not update aria‑hidden (MEDIUM)
issuesFound.explanation: stickyHeader.hide adds a CSS class to hide the header but never sets aria‑hidden, so screen readers may still read the hidden header.
issuesFound.fix: In hide call setAttr(_header, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true'); and in show remove the attribute.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period buttons lack aria‑pressed (HIGH)
issuesFound.explanation: The period toggle buttons (data‑period) visually indicate selection via CSS classes but never expose their state via aria‑pressed, breaking the ARIA toggle pattern.
issuesFound.fix: In _ syncToggleState or the click handler, add setAttr(btn, ARIA.PRESSED, String(isActive)); for each button.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open/close actions not announced via live region (MEDIUM)
issuesFound.explanation: Opening or closing a dropdown updates the UI but does not provide a screen‑reader announcement, leaving users unaware of the change.
issuesFound.fix: After _setExpanded or within _openInstance/closeInstance, call liveRegion.announce(‘Menu opened’/‘Menu closed’).

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation open/close actions not announced via live region (MEDIUM)
issuesFound.explanation: mobileNav.open and close change visibility of the navigation drawer without any live‑region announcement, so users cannot know when the menu appears or disappears.
issuesFound.fix: After setExpanded or at the end of open/close, call liveRegion.announce(‘Navigation menu opened’/‘Navigation menu closed’).

issuesFound.title: Sticky header hide/show actions not announced via live region (MEDIUM)
issuesFound.explanation: When the header auto‑hides on scroll, no live‑region message is emitted, so screen‑reader users are not informed that the header has disappeared.
issuesFound.fix: In hide and show add liveRegion.announce(‘Header hidden’/‘Header shown’).

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle button missing ARIA‑label
issuesFound.explanation: The same `.nav-toggle` button lacks an accessible name (`aria-label` or visible text), making it invisible to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: Add `aria-label="Open navigation menu"` (and update to `"Close navigation menu"` when open) or provide visible text.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger button does not update `aria-expanded`
issuesFound.explanation: Buttons that open dropdown menus (`[data-dropdown] button[aria-haspopup]`) never set `aria-expanded` to reflect the open/closed state, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the menu visibility.
issuesFound.fix: In the `_openInstance` and `_closeInstance` functions, call `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')` when opening and `'false'` when closing.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion trigger button does not update `aria-expanded`
issuesFound.explanation: FAQ question buttons (`[data-faq-trigger]`) are toggled open/closed but never have their `aria-expanded` attribute updated, so assistive technology cannot convey the state.
issuesFound.fix: In the `open` and `close` functions of `faqAccordion`, set `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')` when opening and `'false'` when closing.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle button missing `aria-pressed` state
issuesFound.explanation: The billing‑period toggle (`[data-billing-toggle]`) acts as a two‑state switch but does not expose its state via `aria-pressed`, preventing screen‑reader users from knowing whether “monthly” or “annual” is selected.
issuesFound.fix: In the `setPeriod` function, after changing the period, call `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-pressed', period === 'year' ? 'true' : 'false')` (or appropriate logic for the current period).

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle button missing `aria-controls` linking to the pricing table
issuesFound.explanation: The toggle does not have an `aria-controls` attribute that points to the pricing comparison table, so users cannot discover the relationship between the control and the content it affects.
issuesFound.fix: Add `aria-controls="pricing-table"` (or the actual table ID) to the toggle element.

issuesFound.title: Product filter count badge updates are not announced via a live region
issuesFound.explanation: When filters change, the product count badge (`[data-product-count]`) is updated, but no ARIA live region announces the new count, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the result.
issuesFound.fix:
Create a hidden live region (e.g., `
`) and update its text with the new count each time the badge changes.

issuesFound.title: Theme switcher toggle buttons do not expose `aria-pressed` state consistently
issuesFound.explanation: Buttons with `data-theme-toggle` are used to change the site theme, but the script only sets `aria-pressed` on initialization; when the theme is changed via the `toggle()` function, the attribute is not updated, causing a mismatch between visual state and accessibility state.
issuesFound.fix: In the `toggle()` function of `themeSwitcher`, after changing the theme, call `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', btn.getAttribute('data-theme-toggle') === newPref ? 'true' : 'false')` for all theme toggle buttons.

issuesFound.title: Media player elements lack `tabindex` and accessible name for custom controls
issuesFound.explanation: The `mediaPlayerController` binds keyboard shortcuts to `<video>` and `<audio>` elements but does not ensure they are focusable (`tabindex="0"`) nor provides an accessible name (`aria-label`) describing the media. Users navigating via keyboard may not be able to focus the media element to use the shortcuts.
issuesFound.fix: In `mediaPlayerController.bind`, after setting `tabindex`, also add `setAttr(media, 'aria-label', 'Media player with keyboard controls')` or a more specific label.

fpTitles: Media player elements lack `tabindex` and accessible name for custom controls

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement on forced-colors :focus-visible
issuesFound.explanation: The forced-colors media query overrides focus styles to remove the outline without providing a visible alternative, leaving high-contrast mode users without any focus indication.

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement on .focus-ring-brand:focus-visible
issuesFound.explanation: This class sets only outline-color while the global :focus-visible rule sets outline: none, resulting in a zero-width outline that is invisible. The outline-color property alone cannot create a visible focus ring.

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement on account navigation links

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement on feature card links

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement on filter tabs

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement on pricing toggle buttons

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement on checkbox inputs

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement on footer navigation links

issuesFound.title: Touch target may be below recommended size on .btn

issuesFound.title: Touch target may be below recommended size on navigation menu items

issuesFound.title: Touch target may be below recommended size on submenu links

issuesFound.title: Touch target may be below recommended size on search input

issuesFound.title: Touch target may be below recommended size on filter tabs

issuesFound.title: Touch target may be below recommended size on pricing toggle

issuesFound.title: Broken visually-hidden utility removes content from screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: The .sr-only class uses position: static, width: auto, and height: auto with overflow: visible, which makes the content visible to sighted users instead of hiding it visually while keeping it accessible to screen readers. This defeats the purpose of screen-reader-only text.

issuesFound.title: Motion animation missing prefers-reduced-motion override on .btn active state
issuesFound.explanation: Buttons have a transform: translateY(1px) animation on the active state with a transition, but there is no @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) override to disable this spatial movement for users with vestibular disorders.

issuesFound.title: Motion animation missing prefers-reduced-motion override on .skip-link
issuesFound.explanation: Skip links use transform: translateY for the reveal animation with transition, but no reduced-motion override exists to disable this movement for users who prefer reduced motion.

issuesFound.title: Motion animation missing prefers-reduced-motion override on hero image
issuesFound.explanation: Hero images have a 3D perspective transform animation on hover with transition, but the empty prefers-reduced-motion media query at line 639 does not actually disable the transform, leaving spatial animation active for sensitive users.

issuesFound.title: Motion animation missing prefers-reduced-motion override on hero CTA buttons
issuesFound.explanation: Primary hero buttons have a transform: translateY(-1px) hover animation that is not disabled in the reduced-motion media query, potentially triggering vestibular issues.

issuesFound.title: Negative word-spacing impairs readability on body text

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer missing focus trap activation
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav module declares a _trap variable for focus trapping but never initializes or activates it. When the mobile menu opens, keyboard focus is not trapped within the drawer, allowing users to tab behind the overlay to background content, violating WCAG 2.4.3 Focus Order.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1714: After `_open = true;`, add `_trap = createFocusTrap(_drawer, { returnFocus: _trigger }); _trap.activate();` to trap focus when open.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing aria-controls
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button does not have an aria-controls attribute referencing the drawer element (_drawer). Users cannot programmatically determine which element is controlled by the toggle.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1766: After obtaining _drawer and _trigger, add `if (_drawer && _trigger) setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', _drawer.id || srUtils.ensureId(_drawer, 'mobile-nav'));`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The _openInstance and _closeInstance functions in dropdownMenu show and hide dropdown panels but do not update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger buttons. The state of the dropdown is not communicated to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1816: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` in _openInstance. Line 1828: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` in _closeInstance.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The faqAccordion.open() function expands a FAQ item and animates the panel height, but unlike the close() function, it fails to set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Screen readers announce the collapsed state incorrectly when the panel is visually open.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2544: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` immediately after `item.open = true;`.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch combobox missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The siteSearch._open() and _close() functions manage the visibility of the suggestion listbox but do not toggle the aria-expanded attribute on the search input (_inputEl). The combobox pattern requires aria-expanded to indicate whether the popup is displayed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2280: Add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` in _open. Line 2292: Add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` in _close.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The markInvalid utility function adds error descriptions via aria-describedby but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the invalid field. Screen readers do not announce the field as invalid, violating WCAG 3.3.1 Error Identification and 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1568: Add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');` inside the markInvalid function.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid missing aria-invalid clear
issuesFound.explanation: The markValid utility function removes aria-describedby references but does not set aria-invalid="false" or remove the aria-invalid attribute from the field. Screen readers may continue to announce the field as invalid after it has been corrected.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1580: Add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');` or `field.removeAttribute('aria-invalid');` inside the markValid function.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu trigger missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdownMenu.register() function ensures aria-haspopup and aria-controls are set, but does not initialize aria-expanded="false" on the trigger button when the dropdown is registered in the closed state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1892: Add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after setting aria-controls.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch input missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The siteSearch.init() function configures the combobox with role, aria-autocomplete, and aria-controls, but does not initialize aria-expanded="false" on the input element before the suggestion list is shown.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2324: Add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after setting other initial attributes.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer missing aria-hidden when closed
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.close() function hides the drawer using CSS classes only (removing 'is-open'), but does not set aria-hidden="true" on the drawer element. Screen readers may still access the visually hidden navigation content.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1730: Add `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden', 'true');` inside close() when the drawer is hidden.

issuesFound.title: productFilter missing live region announcement for results
issuesFound.explanation: The applyFilters function updates the product grid visibility and count badge but does not announce the filter results (e.g., "Showing 5 products") via a live region. Screen reader users are not informed that the content has changed after applying a filter.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2458: After `_updateCountBadge(totalMatches);`, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.filterApplied ? STRINGS.filterApplied(s.activeCategory) : \`Showing \${totalMatches} products\`);`.

issuesFound.title: pricing module missing live region announcement for period change
issuesFound.explanation: When the billing period is toggled between monthly and annual, the price values update visually but no announcement is made to screen readers. Users are not informed that the prices have changed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2712: Add `liveRegion.announce(period === 'year' ? STRINGS.pricingAnnual : STRINGS.pricingMonthly);` after updating the prices.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion missing live region announcement for state change
issuesFound.explanation: The faqAccordion open and close functions expand and collapse FAQ panels but do not announce the state change (e.g., "Question expanded" or "Question collapsed") via the live region utility, even though announcement strings exist in the configuration.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2544: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqOpened ? STRINGS.faqOpened(item.question) : 'Answer expanded');`. Line 2570: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqClosed ? STRINGS.faqClosed(item.question) : 'Answer collapsed');`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu missing live region announcement for state change
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown menus open and close without announcing their state to screen readers. Users navigating with keyboard or screen reader shortcuts are not informed when a dropdown panel appears or disappears.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1816: Add `liveRegion.announce('Menu opened');`. Line 1828: Add `liveRegion.announce('Menu closed');`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing live region announcement for state change
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer opens and closes without announcing its state to screen readers. Users are not informed when the navigation menu is opened or closed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1714: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.navOpen || 'Navigation menu opened');`. Line 1730: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed');`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu open function missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The _openInstance function in dropdownMenu removes the hidden attribute from the panel and adds CSS classes, but does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Screen readers will not announce the expanded state of the dropdown.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu close function missing aria-expanded update

issuesFound.title: mobileNav open function missing aria-expanded update

issuesFound.title: mobileNav close function missing aria-expanded update

issuesFound.title: siteSearch open function missing aria-expanded update

issuesFound.fix: Line 3040: Add setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'true'); after _searchState.open = true;

issuesFound.title: siteSearch close function missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The _close function hides the suggestion listbox but does not set aria-expanded="false" on the combobox input.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch init missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The init function configures the search input as a combobox with aria-controls and aria-haspopup, but does not initialize aria-expanded="false" for the closed state.

issuesFound.title: pricing period buttons missing aria-pressed

issuesFound.title: pricing toggle switch missing aria-checked
